encodings: y: derived metric values (e.g., batting strike rate, bowling economy)
visualization.description: Line chart showing per-match metrics trends (strike rate, economy) over match ID.

effect.description: Filters matches by interaction range on match_id axis, updating subsequent views to focus on filtered matches.

encodings: y: statistics values (e.g., runs, balls faced, wickets)
visualization.description: Box plot comparing distributions of batting and bowling statistics between roles.

encodings: size: derived metric (e.g., strike rate, economy)
visualization.description: Scatter plot correlating performance metrics (e.g., runs vs balls faced) with efficiency derived metrics.

encodings: color: derived metric values (e.g., runs scored, wickets taken)
visualization.description: Heatmap detailing individual performance metrics across venues and opposition teams.
Combined bar and line chart comparing aggregated performance metrics over time between batters and bowlers.

outputs.path: The user browses View 1 at the [Overview] level, observing the overall trends of strike rate and economy metrics across matches. After brushing to select a range of match IDs in View 1, this filters data for [View 2, View 3, and View 4] in the [Exploration] level to delve deeper into distributions, correlations, and contextual performance patterns. Finally, in View 5 at the [Insight] level, the user evaluates aggregated trends and compares player roles over seasons and events.
